description: A 'when X changes, do Y' intent maps to EVENT_SCRIPTS → fd:change, not fd:visible (expression rule). Wrong key produces a visibility rule instead of an event handler.
userMessage: On the contact us form at /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1, when full_name changes, clear the email_address field

rubric.description: The patch op targets fd:change (an event handler inside fd:events) on the full_name field — NOT fd:visible, fd:validate, or any expression rule key. 'When X changes' is always an EVENT_SCRIPTS rule bound to the change event.
The fd:change rule is attached to the full_name field (the change source), not to email_address
The rule body sets or clears email_address (e.g. sets its value to empty/null via setValue or a CALC_EXPRESSION)
